no: Alters fog types and weather patterns for outdoor areas based on biome. Coastal forests get more storms/fog, inner forests more rain, desert areas get sandstorms with ground-colored fog. Special areas (Firewine Bridge, Nyalee's Hideout, etc.) get appropriate fog. Patches FOGAREA.2DA and ARE weather fields. Requires EE Fixpack. English only.

dependencies.reason: REQUIRE_PREDICATE checks EE Fixpack core fixes installed.

sum: Weather effects overhaul adding visual enhancements for rain, fog, and storms.

co.no: Patches FOGAREA.2DA with biome-appropriate fog and weather probabilities for all outdoor areas. Separate 2DA tables for BGEE, BG2EE, and EET.
